title: Creating Files
subtitle: Make files with touch

sections.instruction: Folders are created. Now let's add some files.
sections.prompt: Create a file called `index.html`. Type `touch index.html`.

onSuccess.message: File created! It's empty for now — `touch` creates a blank file.
You see: css, js, and index.html. Files and folders together.

sections.instruction: You can create a file inside a subfolder without navigating there first.

onSuccess.message: Created! You didn't even need to `cd` into the folder first. You can use paths with any command.

sections.instruction: One more — create a JavaScript file in the js folder.

onSuccess.message: Your project is taking shape. Look at the file explorer — it matches what a real web project looks like.

completionMessage: You can now create files with `touch`. Combined with `mkdir`, you can build any project structure.
